raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased an item using my Macy 's credit card. On XX/XX/XXXX, I returned the item in store with receipt. After checking my card for the refund, I called XXXX to find out why my account was not credited. They advised me that a merchandise credit certificate was issued. I was told that they would move the credit from the certificate back to my card account. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received the certificate in the mail and called again. Again, I was told that they would they would move the credit. On XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX and again on XX/XX/XXXX, I was told that my credit card statement would be credited. I have spoken to two supervisors who guaranteed me that this would be done and they would call me and it still hasn't been done. I should not have been issued a merchandise certificate in the first place, my card should have been credited. The amount is {$310.00} and their suggestion was that I can use the merchandise credit. So they would be forcing me to pay the balance on the card and then force me to purchase {$310.00} of merchandise I do not want.
